underlying_goal: Rename and rebrand their pet diary app from PetauLife to auExpert, fix numerous bugs, implement new features (STT, photo analysis, diary narration), and restructure modules
friction_detail: Multiple database schema mismatches between code and actual tables required iterative debugging, old project IDs/slugs persisted, icon naming conflicts, and toolbar icons failed to appear despite multiple attempts.
brief_summary: User rebranded their app from PetauLife to auExpert, fixed numerous bugs, and implemented features like STT and diary narration across 47+ files, achieving most goals despite significant friction from schema mismatches and build config issues.
